Hero.title: Move & Meet
Hero.subtitle: Hikes, runs, pilates. A community of strong women with soft hearts in Switzerland.

movement.title: Movement
movement.body: Hiking, running, pilates, strength. Movement as a given.

connection.title: Connection
connection.body: Real encounters. Conversations that go deeper. Matcha after.

sisterhood.title: Sisterhood
sisterhood.body: Strong women. Soft hearts. Active deen. A community that holds.

Events.title: Events
Events.subtitle: Our upcoming hikes, runs, pilates sessions and matcha dates. Sign up via WhatsApp or Instagram.
Events.noUpcoming: No events scheduled right now. Follow us on Instagram so you do not miss the next one.

detail.joinIntro: We coordinate via WhatsApp and Instagram. Reach out, we cannot wait to meet you.

About.title: Who we are
About.subtitle: Move & Meet was born from the wish to create a space for women who want to move without having to put on a mask.

vision.quote: Strong women. Soft hearts. Active deen.
vision.paragraph1: We believe that movement is more than training. It is the excuse to leave the house, take time for yourself and meet other women looking for the same.
vision.paragraph2: Move & Meet is open to all fitness levels. We move at the pace of the slowest because the goal is that everyone arrives. No one is left behind.
vision.paragraph3: After the movement comes matcha. We take time for real conversations because community without depth stays empty.

aysin.name: Aysin
aysin.bio: Mother of four, runner and strength coach at heart. Aysin brings the discipline and the warmth that carry this community.

michelle.name: Michelle
michelle.bio: Business psychology student. Michelle organises group sport, pilates and the matcha dates afterwards where friendships are made.

Community.title: Our community
Community.subtitle: Strong women, soft hearts. A group of women who hold each other up, without competition, without pressure.

gallery.heading: What Move & Meet feels like
gallery.label: Impressions from the community
gallery.tile1: We move at the pace of the slowest. Always.
gallery.tile4: Women who lift each other up instead of comparing.

welcome.heading: Beginners welcome
welcome.body: You do not need to bring anything except the willingness to move and meet. We were all first-timers once. If you are unsure, send us a short message in advance and we will pick you up at the meeting point in person.

FAQ.title: FAQ
FAQ.subtitle: What you should know before your first event. If your question is not answered here, just write to us.

beginners.question: Am I fit enough?
beginners.answer: Yes. Every event is tagged with a level (Easy, Moderate, Challenging). At the Easy level we move at the pace of the slowest. If you walk regularly, you are good to come.

womenOnly.question: Are events women-only?
womenOnly.answer: Yes. Move & Meet is a space by and for women. That is the core of the idea and it will not change.

cost.question: What does it cost?
cost.answer: Nothing. The events themselves are free. Things like mountain railways, public transport tickets or your matcha at the café are on you.

equipment.question: Do I need special gear?
equipment.answer: For pilates and walking, comfortable clothes and a water bottle are enough. For hikes you need good shoes, a rain jacket and enough water. Details are in each event description.

religion.question: Do I have to be Muslim to come along?
religion.answer: No. Move & Meet was founded by women with an Active Deen background, but events are open to all women who share our values. Respect, honesty, consideration.

safety.question: What about safety?
safety.answer: At every event there is at least one experienced person on site. We share the meeting point, route and expected end time in advance. On hikes and runs we never let anyone return alone.

signup.question: How do I sign up?
signup.answer: Via our WhatsApp group or by DM on Instagram. You will find both links on the Join page. There is no formal sign-up on the website at the moment.

kids.question: Can I bring my kids?
kids.answer: For most sporting events sadly not, because we focus on the pace of the group. For selected walks and matcha dates we sometimes make exceptions, that will be stated in the event description.

Join.title: Come with us
Join.subtitle: We coordinate everything via WhatsApp and Instagram. Write to us, we cannot wait to meet you.
Join.footnote: Both channels are external. We see your number or your profile. Nothing more. What you share is up to you.

Legal.title: Impressum and privacy
Legal.subtitle: Responsible party, contact and how we handle data.

impressum.heading: Impressum
impressum.responsibleAddress: Address will be added before launch, Switzerland
impressum.disclaimer: In Phase 1 this website is operated by a private person. Once the Move & Meet association is founded, the responsible party will be updated accordingly.

scope.heading: Scope
scope.body: This privacy policy applies to the website movemeet.ch and all sub-pages. It informs you about which data we process when you visit our site.

controller.heading: Controller
controller.body: The person named in the Impressum is the controller for data processing. For privacy questions you can reach us via the email address above.

processing.heading: Which data we process
processing.body: When you visit our website, our hosting provider (Cloudflare) records technically necessary server logs. These include IP address, time of access, page requested and user agent. These logs are used solely for operational security and are deleted after a short period.

cookies.heading: Cookies and tracking
cookies.body: We do not use tracking cookies, analytics or profiling. The only client-side storage concerns your language preference (DE/EN) so you do not have to choose it on every visit.

processors.heading: Processors
processors.body: The website is hosted on Cloudflare Workers. Cloudflare therefore processes server logs as a sub-processor on our behalf. Cloudflare is certified according to EU standards (standard contractual clauses).

rights.heading: Your rights
rights.body: You have the right at any time to information, correction, deletion and restriction of the processing of your data under revFADP (Switzerland) and GDPR (EU). To exercise these rights, contact the email address given in the Impressum.

changes.heading: Changes
changes.body: This privacy policy may be updated if data processing changes. The current version is always on this page.
